metadata.note: V-T4 pact: the customer-bff browse endpoint (GET /v1/customer/home, 02 §4.2) and geo search are served by the search-query service. File-based broker (see contracts/pacts/customer-bff__placeholder.json): registryctl pact-verify REPLAYS each interaction against the REAL search-query booted by ci/pact-verify.sh (search_v2 on), asserting status + response shape. ci/pact-verify.sh pre-seeds a fixed store mer_01hpactsearch000000000000 at 13.7563,100.5018 via POST /v1/index/merchants (provider state). Non-deterministic/geo-derived fields (distance_m, eta_minutes, delivery_fee.amount) are NOT pinned; stable scalars (store_id, name, rating, open, currency) are.

interactions.description: browse feed near a point returns nearby open stores with fee + rating
geo search for a dish returns the matching store
